# GitHub / Copilot provider pack

Install pack for GitHub Copilot in VS Code, Visual Studio, and JetBrains.

| Source | Installs to |
|--------|-------------|
| `instructions/*.instructions.md` | `.github/instructions/` |
| `prompts/*.prompt.md` | `.github/prompts/` |
| `copilot-instructions.md` | `.github/copilot-instructions.md` (seed if missing on install) |

Run install/update from `distribution/generated/github/install|update/{main|dev}.md`.

Docs: [Repository instructions](https://docs.github.com/en/copilot/how-tos/copilot-on-github/customize-copilot/add-custom-instructions/add-repository-instructions), [VS Code custom instructions](https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/customization/custom-instructions)..
